name: reachify-plugin
description: Reachify judgement-job worker — poll the queue, hand each job to a sub-agent, and report the result back. Ships the worker-loop skill plus a slash command to drive it.

api_key.title: Reachify key
api_key.description: Your Reachify account key — passed to `reachify login` as the id.

api_token.title: Reachify token
api_token.description: Your Reachify API token — passed to `reachify login` as the token.
